name: HUMINT Field Network
description: A clandestine network of human intelligence assets embedded in foreign governments, militaries, and institutions. Provides irreplaceable strategic insight but requires years to cultivate and is vulnerable to counterintelligence.

specialAbilities.name: Deep Cover Assets
specialAbilities.description: Long-term embedded agents provide advance warning of enemy strategic decisions and political shifts.

specialAbilities.name: Covert Influence Operations
specialAbilities.description: Assets can subtly influence foreign decision-makers, potentially altering enemy policy without attribution.
